evidence_snippets: gatekeeping. I mean do you have any idea how hard it is to be an Asian woman in this country?
Ken goes to a LUXURY SUV. A TERRIFYING ASIAN GUY waits by the car. An EQUALLY TERRIFYING ASIAN GUY is in the driver's seat.
The driver glares at her. Jenny sees it's an ASIAN MAN and her face immediately brightens into a big smile.
